case_title: WONG, KING WAI LO VS HARINGTON, KATHERINE F.

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $351.18 FILED BY WONG, KING WAI LO AS TO DEFENDANT HARINGTON, KATHERINE F. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-31-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT HARINGTON, KATHERINE F.
